title: Derived FactStore index over note frontmatter (reconcile-at-ingest)
description: Add a pure mapping from a VaultNote's frontmatter to FactInput records and a reindex function that applies them to a FactStore through the existing writeFact/reconcileFact path, honoring notes flagged status:superseded. This makes the FactStore a derived, rebuildable active-state index over canonical note frontmatter.

successCriteria.description: The project compiles: `npm run build` (tsc) completes with no errors after the mapping and reindex modules are added.

A unit test asserts noteToFacts maps a note to one FactInput per frontmatter key with scope=domain, subject=frontmatter id when present else the vault-relative path, predicate=the key, and value=the stringified frontmatter value.
A unit test runs reindexNotes twice over identical notes against a :memory: FactStore and asserts the second pass returns all-noop actions and the active-fact count is unchanged.

A unit test changes one frontmatter value between two reindex passes and asserts the prior fact row has t_invalidated set (superseded) while the new value is the only active fact for that subject/predicate.
A unit test reindexes a note whose frontmatter contains status:superseded and asserts getActiveFacts returns zero facts contributed by that note.

nonGoals: Do not add the CLI command in this sprint (deferred to sprint 3).
Do not modify src/state/facts.ts or src/orchestrator/memory/reconcile.ts — consume them as-is.
Do not call Date.now() or new Date() inside the mapping or reindex functions — accept an injected `now` parameter.
Do not introduce a second persistence mechanism — write only through writeFact/reconcileFact.
Do not hardcode medical frontmatter keys; the mapping iterates whatever keys the note carries.
stopConditions: All success criteria sc-2-1..sc-2-5 pass under the evaluator.
`npm test` passes including the new mapping/reindex tests with no pre-existing test regressed.
reindexNotes returns a summary object with notesParsed, factsAdded, factsSuperseded, and factsNoop counts.
definitionOfDone: Given a set of parsed VaultNotes and a target FactStore plus an injected now timestamp, reindexNotes walks each non-superseded note, maps its frontmatter to FactInput records, and writes them via writeFact so duplicate values become noop and changed values supersede the prior fact. A note flagged status:superseded contributes no active facts. The FactStore is thereby a derived, rebuildable index over canonical frontmatter, and re-running reindex over unchanged notes mutates nothing.
assumptions: writeFact (src/orchestrator/memory/reconcile.ts:148-154) is the sanctioned reconcile-at-ingest entry point; no judge is wired here so ambiguous-key collisions fall back to deterministic ADD (reconcile.ts:93-96).

FactInput requires scope, subject, predicate, value, confidence, sourceRunId, tValid, tCreated (src/state/facts.ts:22-31); reindex sets tValid=tCreated=now (injected) and confidence=1, sourceRunId=null unless caller supplies one.
subject identity = frontmatter `id` if present else the vault-relative note path (spec Q1).
value stringification: scalars via String(), lists/objects via stable JSON.stringify, so identical frontmatter produces identical fact ids (src/state/facts.ts:58-69 deterministic id).
outOfScope: Walking the filesystem to load notes (the CLI in sprint 3 supplies parsed notes / a loader).
Wiring an LLM FactJudge into reconcile (deterministic path only).
Bitemporal querying beyond active/superseded state (git history is the bitemporal source).
generatorNotes: Create src/vault/index-map.ts (noteToFacts(note, { scope, now, sourceRunId? }): FactInput[] — PURE) and src/vault/reindex.ts (reindexNotes(store: FactStore, notes: VaultNote[], { scope, now, judge? }): Promise<ReindexSummary>). Import FactStore + writeFact + FactInput from '../state/facts.js' (writeFact is re-exported there per src/state/facts.ts:13). Tally the ReconcileAction returned by writeFact (add/update/noop) into the summary. Detect superseded notes by reading note.frontmatter.status === 'superseded' (use the convention constant — coordinate with sprint 5 if it lands first, otherwise inline the literal 'superseded' and export a SUPERSEDED_STATUS const for sprint 5 to consume). Stringify list/object values with JSON.stringify so deterministic ids stay stable. Keep both functions clock-free: accept `now` as an ISO string param (mirror src/cli/commands/facts.ts:86 boundary discipline). Use a :memory: FactStore in tests (new FactStore(':memory:')).
evaluatorNotes: Confirm reindexNotes goes through writeFact (not store.insertFact directly) by inspecting imports. Verify the second-pass-all-noop test actually asserts ReconcileAction==='noop' for every fact, not just an unchanged count. For the supersede test, query the raw row (store.getFact(id) or getActiveFacts) to confirm t_invalidated is non-null on the old value. For the status:superseded test, confirm zero active facts from that note's keys. Confirm no Date.now/new Date in src/vault/index-map.ts or reindex.ts. Run the full suite.
